AddMemberToGroup.description: This operation is used to add a member to an O365 group, using a UPN.

CalendarDeleteItem_V2.description: This operation deletes an event in a calendar.

CreateCalendarEventV2.description: This operation is used to create a new event in a group calendar.

HttpRequestV2.description: Construct a Microsoft Graph REST API request to invoke. There is one segment that is supported: /groups. Learn more: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/use-the-api.

ListDeletedGroups.description: Lists deleted groups that can be restored.

ListDeletedGroupsByOwner.description: List deleted groups that can be restored by owner

ListGroupMembers.description: This operation returns a list of all members in the given group and their details such as name, title, email, etc. You can query up to 1000 items using Top parameter. In case you need to retrieve more than 1000 values please turn on Settings->Pagination feature and provide Threshold limit.

ListGroups.description: This operation returns a list of all groups in the organization.

ListOwnedGroups.description: This operation returns a list of all groups that you own.

ListOwnedGroups_V2.description: This operation returns a list of all groups that you own.

ListOwnedGroups_V3.displayName: List groups that I own and belong to
ListOwnedGroups_V3.description: This operation returns a list of all groups that you own and belong to.

OnGroupMembershipChange.displayName: When a group member is added or removed
OnGroupMembershipChange.description: This operation triggers when a member is added to or removed from the given group.

OnNewEvent.displayName: When there is a new event
OnNewEvent.description: This operation triggers when a new event is added to a group calendar.

RemoveMemberFromGroup.description: This operation is used to remove a member from an O365 group, using a UPN.

UpdateCalendarEvent.description: This operation is used to update a new event in a group calendar.
